policies.title: Policies
policies.empty: No policies yet. Create one with "New policy".

create.title: New policy
create.intro: The policy is created inactive (version 1). Putting it in production is a separate, explicit activation step.
create.pdpRejected: The PDP rejected the policy document:
create.duplicateId: A policy with this id already exists.

fields.projectHint: Owning application. A policy belongs to exactly one.
fields.resourceTypeHint: Clean type name (e.g. document) — each app has its own namespace.
fields.actionsHint: Comma-separated verbs, or "*" for all (e.g. read, update).

rules.title: Rules
rules.noConditions: No conditions — the rule always applies.
rules.literalHint: Numbers and true/false are typed automatically; anything else is text.
rules.orderingNeedsNumber: Ordering operators (GT/GTE/LT/LTE) require a numeric value (ADR-023).
rules.advancedJson: This document uses advanced structures (or/nested groups) — edit it as JSON.
rules.invalidJson: Invalid JSON — fix it before switching back to the builder.
rules.jsonHint: Full rules array. Switching back to the builder requires builder-compatible structures.

validation.rulesArray: Must be a JSON array of rules
